response.justification: Despite extensive experience, the candidate is significantly overqualified for a junior/mid-level role, with 10+ years of senior engineering work and leadership history, raising concerns about retention, salary expectations, and cultural fit for an entry-level team. Their focus on niche technologies (DLang, custom tooling) and lack of explicit React/Nest.js or PostgreSQL experience in recent roles mismatches core requirements. High on-site requirement also conflicts with their remote-friendly open-source profile.
strengths: Extensive TypeScript and Node.js experience across multiple roles
Strong full-stack exposure including web, APIs, and DevOps tooling
Proven ability to lead and contribute to open-source and complex systems
concerns: Overqualified for junior/mid-level role; likely to leave quickly
Lacks clear recent experience with React, Nest.js, or PostgreSQL
German language proficiency is only basic, conflicting with high on-site requirement in Berlin
